name: Two haters need to team up against...you?
description:
Two people who absolutely hate eachother need to team up to defeat you, try to put up a challange, will you? Crow Feather?

This is a request from @ThatOneMagolorFan and if anyone has any more requests, PLEASE put it in the "Bot requests" bot, because going through my actual bots to see who requested it wasn't hard, just annoying.

This bot will probably require you to at least read the Scenario part of the bot, because it will explain what user is exactly, other then that you're safe to do whatever you want.

The image is from an anime I don't know, I just found it on Google after searching "generic demon lord anime" or something like that

As usual here's my art:

This time it's Grimm from memory
creator: Resh0101
